phrases.intent_en: Ask for the museum's opening hours
phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les horaires du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel sohn layz oh-REHR doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée d'Ethnographie de Genève (MEG) is open daily except Mondays.

responses.english: From 10 AM to 6 PM. Closed Monday.
responses.phonetic: duh deez UHR ah deez-weet UHR. fehr-MAY luh luhn-DEE
responses.french: De dix heures à dix-huit heures. Fermé le lundi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a temporary exhibition on now
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une exposition temporaire en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon ex-poh-zee-SYOHN tahm-poh-REHR ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The MEG regularly hosts temporary exhibitions alongside its permanent collection.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum is free
phrases.cultural_note: Like all Geneva municipal museums, the MEG's permanent collection is free to visit. It is a great option for a rainy afternoon in the city.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the museum
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous m'indiquer comment me rendre au Musée d'Ethnographie ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY-voo man-dee-KAY koh-MOHN muh ROHN-druh oh moo-ZAY det-noh-grah-FEE
phrases.cultural_note: The MEG is located in the Plainpalais district, a short walk from the tram stop Plainpalais and close to the University of Geneva campus.

responses.english: Boulevard Carl-Vogt, ten minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: bool-VAR karl-VOGT, ah dee mee-NOOT ah PYAY
responses.french: Boulevard Carl-Vogt, à dix minutes à pied.

phrases.text_local: La boutique du musée est-elle ouverte ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah boo-TEEK doo moo-ZAY eh-TEL oo-VAIRT
phrases.cultural_note: The MEG shop sells ethnographic publications, artisanal crafts from around the world and unique gift items — a good place to find unusual souvenirs.

responses.english: At the exit, on the right.
responses.phonetic: ah lah sor-TEE, soor lah DRWAHT
responses.french: À la sortie, sur la droite.
